entries.feedback_text:
Hot one today
Legs felt a little stiff before the run, so was a little apprehensive about this.
1 km chilled, then 3 km comfortable, although felt a bit like I was edging into controlled in places. It was the right effort for the length, but when I go longer, need to ease off a bit.
Did actually run up the steep hill near my house to finish off, and it felt good 
Lap      Distance   Avg Pace   Avg HR   Max HR
          (km)      (min/km)    (bpm)    (bpm)
1         1.00       8:05        120      130
2         1.00       7:32        132      136
3         1.00       7:37        137      142
4         0.93       7:17        144      154
Summary   3.93       7:38        133      154
entries.headline: Yaiza Running — 3.93 km in 30:00 — avg HR 133 / max 154
